title: taphaph #8608
definition:
1) to play or sound the timbrel, beat, play upon, drum (on a timbrel or
    other object)
    1a) (Qal) playing (participle)
    1b) (Poel) beating (participle)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to play or sound the timbrel, beat, play upon, drum (on a timbrel or
    other object)
    1a) (Qal) playing (participle)
    1b) (Poel) beating (participle)

    NASB:  to sound the timbrel, beat
